name: bootstrap-trendx
title: Bootstrap TrendX project foundation
description: Establish the initial project definition, repository entrypoint, and first implementation path for TrendX.
creator: Blur
notes: Project kickoff task for turning the TrendX repository into a real product codebase using the selected Trellis nextjs-fullstack template. Template paths such as packages/* and @your-app/* are target architecture references until the actual app scaffold is created.
